name: Lemon Sole & Carrot Bundles
recipeIngredient: 4 medium carrots, cut into 5 strips each
1 1/2 cups herb seasoned stuffing, crumbly style
1 pound sole fillets, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, place the carrots and add enough water to cover them. Bring to a boil.
3. Cook the carrots over medium heat until they are crisp-tender (6-8 minutes).
4. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, stir together the remaining ingredients except the fish; set aside.
5. Separate the fillets and divide the cooked carrots equally among the fillets.
6. Wrap each fillet around its portion of carrots.
7. Place the wrapped fillets, seam side down, in a 9-inch square baking pan.
8. Sprinkle with the stuffing mixture.
9. Cover; bake for 10 minutes.
10. Uncover and continue baking for 8-10 minutes or until the fish flakes easily.
